SURVIVAL.Panel.Title: Survival
SURVIVAL.Panel.Name: Name
SURVIVAL.Panel.ResetConfirm: Clear all hunger, thirst, and cold statuses and remove the conditions this module applied? Supplies, pools, and the day count are kept.
SURVIVAL.Panel.PartyMemberHint: Consumes food and water each day. Turn off for a structure or an inactive character — its supplies stay tracked.
SURVIVAL.Panel.BaseHint: Its supply is shared stock the whole party draws from (a living base like Chiga-Biga can be a party member too).
SURVIVAL.Panel.RemoveMemberConfirm: Remove {name} from survival tracking? Their own supply pool is removed too, and conditions applied by this module are cleared.
SURVIVAL.Panel.RemovePoolConfirm: Remove the base "{name}" and its tracked supplies?
SURVIVAL.Panel.TransferNone: Nothing to transfer — the source has none of that resource.
SURVIVAL.MigratedLedger: Survival: supply mode switched to Ledger — pools now read real inventory (rations count).
SURVIVAL.WaterSpell.PlayerHint: Someone in the party will go thirsty. It needs about {need} more water today, and each casting makes {units}. How many will you cast?
SURVIVAL.WaterSpell.NoSocket: Survival: socketlib isn't active, so players can't be prompted for Create Water. Enable socketlib, or decide it here on the GM panel.
SURVIVAL.WaterSpell.PromptBody: Without more water, someone goes thirsty today. Should {name} cast {spell}? This expends the prepared spell (a slot or use). Unused conjured water evaporates at the end of the day.
SURVIVAL.WaterSpell.GmHint: The party is short about {need} water today; each casting makes {units}. Owning players are being asked — you can decide any row yourself, and your choice closes their prompt.
SURVIVAL.WaterSpell.Conjured: Conjured water: +{n} for today ({casts} casting(s)). Whatever isn't drunk evaporates at day's end.
SURVIVAL.Settings.waterSpell.name: Water spells (Create Water)
SURVIVAL.Settings.waterSpell.hint: When an advance would leave someone thirsty, prompt casters with a PREPARED water spell (or a slot/use left) to cast it. The player answers; the GM can override.
SURVIVAL.Settings.waterSpellUnits.name: Water per cast
SURVIVAL.Settings.waterSpellUnits.hint: Water units one cast creates. Create Water makes 2 gallons; 1 gallon = 4 units → 8.
SURVIVAL.Settings.waterSpellSlugs.name: Water spell slugs
SURVIVAL.Settings.waterSpellSlugs.hint: Comma-separated spell slugs that count as water-creating (default: create-water).
SURVIVAL.Settings.rationsSourceUuid.name: Rations item (UUID)
SURVIVAL.Settings.rationsSourceUuid.hint: Optional: a specific Rations item (UUID) to clone when the module adds food. Blank = the pf2e SRD Rations.
SURVIVAL.Mode.ledger: Supply: Ledger — pools read real inventory (rations count automatically).
SURVIVAL.Mode.abstract: Supply: Abstract — pools are manual day-counts (inventory is ignored).
SURVIVAL.Hud.Title: Party survival
SURVIVAL.NoGM: A GM must be online to apply that.
SURVIVAL.Card.Title: Upkeep — {days} day(s)
SURVIVAL.Card.Green: {days} day(s) passed — everyone fed, watered, and warm.
SURVIVAL.Card.Nudge: You went without {kind}. Find some soon, or it'll start to bite.
SURVIVAL.Card.NudgeIntro: Your characters went without today — find more soon, or it'll start to bite:
SURVIVAL.Card.Overflow: A long stretch passed — only the first days were tracked in detail.
SURVIVAL.Forage.Result: {name} foraged and gathered {food} day(s) of food.
SURVIVAL.Forage.CantRoll: This creature can't attempt a Survival check here.
SURVIVAL.Settings.forageDC.name: Forage DC
SURVIVAL.Settings.forageDC.hint: The Survival DC for a Subsist attempt (harsher / scarcer regions = higher).
SURVIVAL.Settings.nextWaterDays.name: Next water (days)
SURVIVAL.Settings.nextWaterDays.hint: Days until the next water source (desert countdown). 0 = off. Counts down as time advances.
SURVIVAL.HotMeal.EffectDesc: A hearty hot meal. You gained temporary Hit Points equal to your level and feel restored. It fades when the next day begins or after a Rest for the Night.
SURVIVAL.HotMeal.Cooked: A hot meal is cooked. {n} now well-fed (temporary Hit Points).
SURVIVAL.HotMeal.CookedTooltip: Already cooked today. Advance a day to cook again.
SURVIVAL.HotMeal.NoWood: No firewood with the party to cook a hot meal.
SURVIVAL.HotMeal.CantCook: This system can't apply the hot-meal effect.
SURVIVAL.Settings.hotMeal.name: Hot meal (cooking)
SURVIVAL.Settings.hotMeal.hint: Show a Cook button that burns 1 firewood to grant the party a well-fed buff (temporary HP), once per day.
SURVIVAL.Settings.hotMealEffectUuid.name: Hot meal effect (UUID)
SURVIVAL.Settings.hotMealEffectUuid.hint: Optional: an effect-item UUID to apply instead of the built-in one (e.g. a Kingmaker camp meal). Blank = built-in.
SURVIVAL.Panel.Empty: No caravan yet — add party members to begin.
SURVIVAL.Status.hunger.label: Hunger
SURVIVAL.Status.thirst.label: Thirst
SURVIVAL.Status.cold.label: Cold
SURVIVAL.Settings.supplyDetail.name: Supply detail
SURVIVAL.Settings.supplyDetail.hint: Abstract: pools are day counts you click to edit. Ledger: pools are real actor inventories the engine decrements.
SURVIVAL.Settings.upkeepPrompt.name: Upkeep prompt
SURVIVAL.Settings.upkeepPrompt.hint: Show the daily card always, or only when there's a shortfall or a real choice.
SURVIVAL.Settings.sourceMode.name: Source priority
SURVIVAL.Settings.sourceMode.hint: Whether the resolver drains shared pools or personal packs first.
SURVIVAL.Settings.climateModel.name: Climate
SURVIVAL.Settings.climateModel.hint: Off disables water scaling and the cold track. Manual lets you pick a band per region.
SURVIVAL.Settings.lethalDeprivation.name: Survival mode
SURVIVAL.Settings.lethalDeprivation.hint: Off caps consequences at stage 3 (no death). Harsh adds worse debuff stages but never kills. Survival lets deprivation climb all the way to a GM-confirmed death.
SURVIVAL.Settings.deprivationPace.name: Survival mode pace
SURVIVAL.Settings.deprivationPace.hint: How fast the fatal descent (stages 4 to death) unfolds once someone is out of food or water. Stages 1–3 are unaffected. Only matters in Harsh/Survival mode.
SURVIVAL.Settings.splitPartyMode.name: Split party
SURVIVAL.Settings.splitPartyMode.hint: Single party uses one toggle per pool. Named groups support a true simultaneous split.
SURVIVAL.Settings.foraging.name: Foraging
SURVIVAL.Settings.foraging.hint: A once-per-day Survival check that replenishes the communal pool.
SURVIVAL.Settings.maxCatchUpDays.name: Catch-up cap (days)
SURVIVAL.Settings.maxCatchUpDays.hint: A single advance processes at most this many days before asking how to handle a long skip.
SURVIVAL.Settings.mountDefaultApplyConse: Off: a hungry mount is a GM alert. On: deprivation applies real conditions to it.
SURVIVAL.Settings.hudDensity.name: HUD density
SURVIVAL.Settings.hudDensity.hint: How compact the player party HUD is.
SURVIVAL.Death.prompt: {name} has reached the end of what a body can take {cause}. What happens?
